description: Style NoteThe XY for men from hugo boss is a woody aromatic fragrance with green, spicy and woody overtones.Product Detailshugo XY by Hugo boss is a woody fragrance for men, perfect for evening wear, it exudes notes of pear leaf, bergamot, basil, mint, patchouli, musk and cedar.  CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize60 ml
